message:
test(connectors): add migration acceptance tests for Gmail, Calendar, and YouTube

Add comprehensive migration acceptance test suites for three Google-family
connectors validating fcp-google-discovery substrate integration. Each suite
tests: shared substrate auth (BearerToken, CredentialReference), introspection
surface validation, configure behavior, error taxonomy preservation, and
manifest parseability. Gmail additionally tests auth label redaction and
documents intentional deltas between handwritten and generated surfaces.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
